canonical_definition: A 60-item personality inventory used to measure six major dimensions of personality: Honesty-Humility, Emotionality, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, and Openness to Experience.
papers: Automating Steering for Safe Multimodal Large Language Models
Search-o1: Agentic Search-Enhanced Large Reasoning Models
